evidence: Real libprotobuf.a validation succeeded. A custom ZeroCopyInputStream that fails on the first Next() call causes google::protobuf::io::Tokenizer::Next() to return false with tokenizer_error_count=0, and google::protobuf::compiler::Parser::Parse() returns success (parser_ok=1, error_count=0) on the failed stream. No ASan memory violation occurred; the bug is silent read-error swallowing.
